requirement_topic.en: Connector Interoperability — IEC Type 2 / CCS2 Direction vs China GB/T
requirement_topic.zh: 接口互操作——IEC Type 2 / CCS2方向与中国GB/T
requirement_topic.zht: 接口互操作——IEC Type 2 / CCS2方向與中國GB/T

summary.en: South Sudan does not yet have a mature public EV charging connector ecosystem. For donor, utility, fleet, or international project specifications, the prudent technical direction is IEC 62196 Type 2 for AC charging and CCS2 for DC charging, consistent with IEC-aligned 230/400 V, 50 Hz markets. Americas SAE J1772 / CCS1 should not be assumed for this market. Connector selection should be written into the project specification before procurement, including vehicle fleet compatibility, cable length, locking, temperature rise, spare parts, and labelling.
summary.zh: 南苏丹尚未形成成熟的公共电动汽车充电接口生态。对于援助、公共事业、车队或国际项目规范，审慎的技术方向是交流充电采用IEC 62196 Type 2、直流充电采用CCS2，并与IEC体系230/400 V、50 Hz市场保持一致。不应假定该市场采用美洲SAE J1772 / CCS1。采购前应将接口选择写入项目规范，包括车辆车队兼容性、电缆长度、锁止、温升、备件和标签。
summary.zht: 南蘇丹尚未形成成熟的公共電動汽車充電接口生態。對於援助、公共事業、車隊或國際項目規範，審慎的技術方向是交流充電採用IEC 62196 Type 2、直流充電採用CCS2，並與IEC體系230/400 V、50 Hz市場保持一致。不應假定該市場採用美洲SAE J1772 / CCS1。採購前應將接口選擇寫入項目規範，包括車輛車隊兼容性、電纜長度、鎖止、溫升、備件和標籤。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62196-3 — CCS2 / Combo 2 DC vehicle couplers
IEC 61851-1 — EV conductive charging general requirements
IEC 61851-23 — DC electric vehicle supply equipment

summary.en: China AC chargers use GB/T 20234.2 couplers and China DC fast chargers use GB/T 20234.3 couplers with GB/T 27930 communication. GB/T AC and DC interfaces are physically and electrically separate from IEC Type 2 and CCS2 implementations. GB/T 20234.2 has different gender and signalling details from IEC Type 2, while GB/T 20234.3 DC uses a different geometry and GB/T 27930 CAN communication rather than the CCS2 communication stack.
summary.zh: 中国交流充电桩采用GB/T 20234.2耦合器，中国直流快充采用GB/T 20234.3耦合器并配套GB/T 27930通信。GB/T交流和直流接口与IEC Type 2及CCS2实施在物理和电气上属于不同体系。GB/T 20234.2与IEC Type 2在接口性别和信号细节上不同，GB/T 20234.3直流接口则采用不同几何结构和GB/T 27930 CAN通信，而不是CCS2通信栈。
summary.zht: 中國交流充電樁採用GB/T 20234.2耦合器，中國直流快充採用GB/T 20234.3耦合器並配套GB/T 27930通訊。GB/T交流和直流接口與IEC Type 2及CCS2實施在物理和電氣上屬於不同體系。GB/T 20234.2與IEC Type 2在接口性別和信號細節上不同，GB/T 20234.3直流接口則採用不同幾何結構和GB/T 27930 CAN通訊，而不是CCS2通訊棧。

gap.en: A GB/T-only charger should be treated as connector-incompatible for South Sudan projects specifying IEC Type 2 or CCS2. Conversion requires hardware redesign of couplers, cable assemblies, vehicle-inlet matching, locking, proximity and control-pilot signalling, DC communication, labels, spare parts, and temperature-rise evidence. Adapters should not be used as a substitute for a project-compliant connector design.
gap.zh: 对于规定IEC Type 2或CCS2的南苏丹项目，仅支持GB/T的充电桩应视为接口不兼容。转换需要对耦合器、电缆组件、车辆接口匹配、锁止、接近导引和控制导引信号、直流通信、标签、备件和温升证据进行硬件重新设计。转接器不应替代项目合规接口设计。
gap.zht: 對於規定IEC Type 2或CCS2的南蘇丹項目，僅支持GB/T的充電樁應視為接口不兼容。轉換需要對耦合器、電纜組件、車輛接口匹配、鎖止、接近導引和控制導引信號、直流通訊、標籤、備件和溫升證據進行硬件重新設計。轉接器不應替代項目合規接口設計。

mandatory_status.target: Project-specific but technically decisive — IEC Type 2 / CCS2 should be specified for IEC-aligned South Sudan projects unless the vehicle fleet owner documents another connector strategy
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 20234 conformity applies to China domestic connector design and is not an IEC Type 2 / CCS2 substitute

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] For South Sudan, treat IEC Type 2 for AC and CCS2 for DC as the IEC-aligned project direction unless the buyer specifies otherwise. China GB/T 20234 and GB/T 27930 designs are not plug-compatible or protocol-compatible with Type 2 / CCS2 deployments.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 对南苏丹，应将交流IEC Type 2和直流CCS2视为IEC体系项目方向，除非买方另有明确规定。中国GB/T 20234和GB/T 27930设计与Type 2 / CCS2部署不具备插接或协议兼容性。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 對南蘇丹，應將交流IEC Type 2和直流CCS2視為IEC體系項目方向，除非買方另有明確規定。中國GB/T 20234和GB/T 27930設計與Type 2 / CCS2部署不具備插接或協議兼容性。
